text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
You won so many... Thank you. ...I'll put them in
that room.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The room I share with Tachyon... though I'll have
to make sure she doesn't experiment on them...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Um... Feel free to come and say hi to them every
once in a while...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'm sure they'll all welcome you with open arms... Hehe.
